details.test: Task 1: Book earliest 60-min abdominal consultation next month after 2pm
Task 2: Enroll in cheapest beginner abdominal course under 150
Task 3: Add two courses (intermediate and second under constraints) to cart
Task 4: Register for live lung webinar this month after 6 pm with >=1 CME
Task 5: Bookmark three POCUS articles from last 2 years with >=10 min reading time
Task 6: Create 6-hour emergency ultrasound learning plan
Task 7: Schedule 3x45-minute mentorship sessions weekday evenings within 6 weeks
Task 8: Adjust notification settings (24h on, 1h off, marketing off, registered-only webinars)
Task 9: Configure institutional plan for 10 learners under 3000/year with abdominal and vascular
